title: plantago coronopus var. ceratophylla
intro: Plantago coronopus var. ceratophylla, also known as buck's horn plantain or buck's horn, is a variety of the plantain family that is primarily found in the coastal regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Plantago coronopus var. ceratophylla include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
